# Sovra

Sovra is an open-source AI SaaS boilerplate for building multi-tenant AI agent products.

- Repository: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Project page: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/sovra/
- License: MIT
- Stack: Next.js, Go worker, Supabase/Postgres + pgvector, MCP, Stripe

## Primary docs

- Quickstart and overview: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra#-quick-start
- Architecture: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/architecture.md
- Deployment: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/deployment.md
- Environment variables: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/environment-variables.md
- Production readiness: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/production-readiness.md
- Security policy: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/SECURITY.md

## Onboarding and migration

- Customer onboarding DX: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/customer-onboarding-dx.md
- Migration guides: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/migration-guides.md
- Upgrade paths (Sovra -> Klienta/Clynova): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/upgrade-paths.md
- Open-source packaging: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/main/docs/open-source-packaging.md

## Search-intent keywords

AI SaaS boilerplate, open-source AI platform, multi-tenant SaaS starter, MCP boilerplate,
Next.js SaaS template, Go worker boilerplate, Supabase RLS boilerplate, pgvector SaaS template,
agent orchestration platform, self-hosted AI app foundation.
